mapper.sql: request_id, request_key, job_type, source_erp, parent_job_id, correlation_id, causation_id, schema_version, payload_version, channel_cd, status, payload, retry_count, error_message, completed_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS completed_at, created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS created_at, updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' AS updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_job ( request_id, request_key, channel_cd, status, payload, retry_count, error_message, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, job_type, source_erp, parent_job_id, correlation_id, causation_id, schema_version, payload_version ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{requestKey}, #{channelCd}, #{status}, CAST(#{payload} AS json), #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{completedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{jobType}, #{sourceErp}, #{parentJobId}, #{correlationId}, #{causationId}, #{schemaVersion}, #{payloadVersion} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hub_job WHERE correlation_id = #{correlationId} AND payload ->> 'corpId' = CAST(#{corpId} AS varchar) ORDER BY created_at ASC, request_id ASC

SELECT id, request_id, event_type, level, message, channel_cd, mall_key, retry_count, max_retry_count, error_message, detail::text AS detail, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM hub_job_log WHERE request_id = #{requestId} ORDER BY created_at ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE) AS today_total, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'SUCCESS') AS today_success, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'FAILED') AS today_failed, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUEUED') AS queued, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PROCESSING') AS processing, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUEUED' AND retry_count > 0) AS retry_waiting, COALESCE( ROUND( COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE AND status = 'SUCCESS')::numeric * 100 / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE), 0), 1 ), 0 )::float8 AS today_success_rate FROM hub_job WHERE payload ->> 'corpId' = CAST(#{corpId} AS varchar)

SELECT request_id, channel_cd, COALESCE(payload ->> 'frDt', split_part(request_key, '_', 2), '') AS fr_dt, COALESCE(payload ->> 'toDt', split_part(request_key, '_', 3), '') AS to_dt, status, retry_count, error_message, to_char(created_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at, to_char(updated_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS updated_at FROM hub_job WHERE payload ->> 'corpId' = CAST(#{corpId} AS varchar) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT channel_cd, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'SUCCESS') AS success_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'FAILED') AS failed_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PROCESSING') AS processing_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'QUEUED') AS queued_count FROM hub_job WHERE payload ->> 'corpId' = CAST(#{corpId} AS varchar) GROUP BY channel_cd ORDER BY total_count DESC, channel_cd ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE hub_job SET status = 'QUEUED', payload = CAST(#{payload} AS json), retry_count = 0, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_key = #{requestKey} AND status IN ('SUCCESS', 'FAILED')

UPDATE hub_job SET status = 'QUEUED', payload = CAST(#{payload} AS json), retry_count = 0, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_key = #{requestKey} AND payload ->> 'corpId' = CAST(#{corpId} AS varchar) AND status = 'FAILED'

UPDATE hub_job SET status = 'QUEUED', payload = CAST(#{payload} AS json), retry_count = 0, error_message = NULL, completed_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE request_key = #{requestKey} AND status = 'FAILED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hub_job ( request_id, request_key, channel_cd, status, payload, retry_count, error_message, completed_at, created_at, updated_at, job_type, source_erp, parent_job_id, correlation_id, causation_id, schema_version, payload_version ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{requestKey}, #{channelCd}, #{status}, CAST(#{payload} AS json), #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{completedAt}, NOW(), NOW(), #{jobType}, #{sourceErp}, #{parentJobId}, #{correlationId}, #{causationId}, #{schemaVersion}, #{payloadVersion} ) ON CONFLICT (request_key) DO NOTHING
